type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increase in Cooling Tower Usage
There was a decrease in the amount of sulphuric acid used from 844.9 t in 2016 to 781.4 t in 2017
Methanol used onsite increased from 5596.80 tonnes in 2015 to 5948.06 tonnes in 2016.
Maintenance of the system
No significant change

Increased off-site transfers in methanol is due to equipment maintenance. More exchangers and condensers needed cleaning due to performance deterioration. Equipment cleaning schedule is currently under review to ensure efficiency.
No significant change
Increase in amount of Sulphuric Acid disposal due to maintenance activities

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Methanol total air emissions increased because of a significant increase in operation days and biodiesel consumed in 2023 compared to 2022.
Methanol off-site transfer for treatment increased because of a increase in the mass of methanol in items that were transferred off-site in 2023 compared to 2022.
Sulphuric acid off-site transfer for treatment decreased because of a decrease in the mass of Sulphuric acid in items that were transferred off-site in 2023 compared to 2022.
Methanol off-site transfer for treatment decreased because of a decrease in the mass of methanol in items that were transferred off-site in 2024 compared to 2023.
